name: Grasshopper Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt marshmallows in milk over the top of a double boiler.
2. Cool mixture; then stir in liqueurs and whipped cream.
3. Mix melted butter with wafer crumbs.
4. Line a 9-inch pie plate with the wafer crumbs.
5. Pour cream mixture into the pie plate.
6. Place the pie in the freezer until it is firm.
7. Remove from the freezer and let stand at room temperature for about 10 minutes.
8. Sprinkle additional chocolate crumbs on top if desired.
Serves: 6
